title: Effect of Current Ratio, Debt to Equity Ratio, Return on Assets and Net Profit Margin on Stock Prices
author: Yuli Tri Cahyono
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: his study aims to determine and analyze the effect ofCurrent Ratio, Debt to Equity Ratio, Return on AssetsandNet Profit Marginto share prices in food and beverage companies listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange in 2017-2020. The research method used in this study is a quantitative method. The data used is secondary data in the form of financial statements of food and beverage companies listed on the Indonesia Stock Exchange from 2017 to 2020. The sampling method usespurposive samplingand obtained 13 companies. Thus, during the four years of observation (2017-2020) there were 52 samples analyzed. Hypothesis testing in this study using multiple regression analysis. The results showed thatCurrent RatioandNet Profit Margininfluential, whileDebt To Equity RatioandReturn On Assetshas no effect on stock prices.
